# Solutions {.unnumbered}

## Assignment 5: Final Project — Ames Housing Data

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(leaps)
```

### Data Loading and Split

```{r}
set.seed(1)
# ames <- read.csv("https://web.stanford.edu/class/stats191/data/ames2000_NAfix.csv")
# selection_idx <- sample(1:nrow(ames), 1000)
# ames_selection <- ames[selection_idx, ]
# ames_validation <- ames[-selection_idx, ]
```

### Part 1: The Study

```{r}

```

### Part 2: Initial Model

```{r}

```

### Part 3: Selected Model

```{r}

```

### Part 4: Effects of Interest

```{r}

```
